# PriceGap

> PriceGap is an independent buyer-education site that explains real cost gaps in recurring digital products: hosting, domains, SaaS, VPNs, password managers, and software subscriptions.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://pricegap.co/)
- [Domain](https://pricegap.co/domain/)
- [Hosting & VPS](https://pricegap.co/hosting/)
- [Password Managers](https://pricegap.co/password-managers/)
- [SaaS](https://pricegap.co/saas/)
- [VPN & Privacy](https://pricegap.co/vpn/)

## Category guides
- [Domain](https://pricegap.co/domain/)
- [Hosting & VPS](https://pricegap.co/hosting/)
- [Password Managers](https://pricegap.co/password-managers/)
- [SaaS](https://pricegap.co/saas/)
- [VPN & Privacy](https://pricegap.co/vpn/)

## Editorial notes
PriceGap does not publish live price guarantees. Readers should verify current provider prices, renewal terms, refund policies, and advertiser availability before purchase.
